task_completion.description: Verify that the 'order_lines' dataset is loaded into a new workbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'order_lines' dataset is visible in the Data Elements pane on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Horizontal Bar Chart visualization is added to the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visualization is present on the canvas, and the visualization type in the grammar pane is set to 'Horizontal Bar' (or the chart visually displays horizontal bars).

task_completion.description: Verify that Product Category is mapped to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Category' or 'Product Category' field is placed in the Y-Axis (or Category) section of the visualization grammar pane.

task_completion.description: Verify that Sales is mapped to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sales' field is placed in the X-Axis (or Values) section of the visualization grammar pane.

task_completion.description: Verify the chart renders the correct data for Sales by Category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered chart shows three horizontal bars: Technology (largest, ~3.47M), Furniture (middle, ~2.89M), and Office Supplies (smallest, ~2.13M).

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'sales_by_category'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The workbook title at the top of the screen, the active tab, or a save confirmation dialog shows the name 'sales_by_category'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface being used to build the chart, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is a genuine Oracle Analytics visualization.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears within the OAD canvas with standard OAD UI elements (grammar pane, properties pane) active, not as a static image opened in an image viewer.

integrity.description: Verify no external scripting was used to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no IDEs, text editors, or command prompts open showing Python, R, or other code generating the chart.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains exactly 9,000 rows with total sales of 8,500,000.0. The Horizontal Bar Chart for Sales by Product Category must reflect these exact underlying values: Technology = 3,474,847.67, Furniture = 2,893,293.32, and Office Supplies = 2,131,859.01. Visually, Technology should be the longest bar, followed by Furniture, and Office Supplies should be the shortest.
